steps.title: Identify the central requirement
steps.content: The goal is clear: provide an example of a vegetable that contains vitamin C. This is the benchmark. Any answer that doesn't name a specific vegetable fails to accomplish this goal.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content: Only choice C actually names asparagus as the specific vegetable example and connects it to vitamin C. The other choices discuss either the general link between vegetables and vitamin C (A, D) or animal metabolism (B) — but none of them names a concrete vegetable as the required example. That matches choice C — C is correct.
